testsuite.name: as a customer I want to create a booking for an available service with a selected provider to access the service according to my schedule

testcase.name: successful booking creation
testcase.classname: as a customer I want to create a booking for an available service with a selected provider to access the service according to my schedule

testcase.name: booking creation without selecting required fields
